title: OSMF Data Model
description: Schema for validating OSMF Data Model definitions. A Data Model defines a JSON schema for a specific class of knowledge.

$schema.description: Reference to the OSMF meta-schema that validates this Model

$id.description: Unique identifier for this Data Model

name.description: Human-readable name for this Data Model

description.description: Human-readable description of what this Data Model represents

version.description: Semantic version of this Data Model

schema.description: The JSON Schema defining the structure of Data Documents that implement this Model
